'''thobadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnastick|gymnastick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnastick|gymnastick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thobadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobadhithi|thobadhithi]] || [[word:thobadhiji|thobadhiji]] || [[word:thobadhishi|thobadhishi]] || [[word:thobadhiki|thobadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobadhuthuthu|thobadhuthuthu]] || [[word:thobadhujuju|thobadhujuju]] || [[word:thobadhushushu|thobadhushushu]] || [[word:thobadhukuku|thobadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadhuthu|thobadhuthu]] || [[word:thobadhuju|thobadhuju]] || [[word:thobadhushu|thobadhushu]] || [[word:thobadhuku|thobadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhufthuf|thobadhufthuf]] || [[word:thobadhufjuf|thobadhufjuf]] || [[word:thobadhufshuf|thobadhufshuf]] || [[word:thobadhufkuf|thobadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobadhethe|thobadhethe]] || [[word:thobadheje|thobadheje]] || [[word:thobadheshe|thobadheshe]] || [[word:thobadheke|thobadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobadhothotho|thobadhothotho]] || [[word:thobadhojojo|thobadhojojo]] || [[word:thobadhoshosho|thobadhoshosho]] || [[word:thobadhokoko|thobadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadhotho|thobadhotho]] || [[word:thobadhojo|thobadhojo]] || [[word:thobadhosho|thobadhosho]] || [[word:thobadhoko|thobadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhofthof|thobadhofthof]] || [[word:thobadhofjof|thobadhofjof]] || [[word:thobadhofshof|thobadhofshof]] || [[word:thobadhofkof|thobadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thobadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thobadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thobadhĂŠthĂŠ|thobadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thobadhĂŠjĂŠ|thobadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thobadhĂŠshĂŠ|thobadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thobadhĂŠkĂŠ|thobadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thobadhathatha|thobadhathatha]] || [[word:thobadhajaja|thobadhajaja]] || [[word:thobadhashasha|thobadhashasha]] || [[word:thobadhakaka|thobadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobadhatha|thobadhatha]] || [[word:thobadhaja|thobadhaja]] || [[word:thobadhasha|thobadhasha]] || [[word:thobadhaka|thobadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobadhafthaf|thobadhafthaf]] || [[word:thobadhafjaf|thobadhafjaf]] || [[word:thobadhafshaf|thobadhafshaf]] || [[word:thobadhafkaf|thobadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thobadhasha|thobadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobadhshĂ«sha|thobadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobadhrosha|thobadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobadhmusha|thobadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobadhyasha|thobadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobadhnkshĂ«sha|gothobadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobadhnkrosha|gothobadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobadhnkmusha|gothobadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobadhnkyasha|gothobadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thobabadhasha|thobabadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobabadhshĂ«sha|thobabadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobabadhrosha|thobabadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobabadhmusha|thobabadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobabadhyasha|thobabadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobabadhnkshĂ«sha|gothobabadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobabadhnkrosha|gothobabadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobabadhnkmusha|gothobabadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobabadhnkyasha|gothobabadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thebĂŠdhasha|thebĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thebĂŠdhshĂ«sha|thebĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thebĂŠdhrosha|thebĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thebĂŠdhmusha|thebĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thebĂŠdhyasha|thebĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothebĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gothebĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothebĂŠdhnkrosha|gothebĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothebĂŠdhnkmusha|gothebĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothebĂŠdhnkyasha|gothebĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thobfadhasha|thobfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thobfadhshĂ«sha|thobfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thobfadhrosha|thobfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thobfadhmusha|thobfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thobfadhyasha|thobfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothobfadhnkshĂ«sha|gothobfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothobfadhnkrosha|gothobfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothobfadhnkmusha|gothobfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothobfadhnkyasha|gothobfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
